1.description: Get Kristiansand kommunenummer, geometry (GeoJSON) and bbox in 25833

2.description: Select 1 km grid cells within Kristiansand bbox and return grid geometries

3.description: Select 200-year storm-flood polygons within Kristiansand bbox

4.description: Find grid cells that intersect 200-year storm-flood polygons

5.description: Filter those grid cells to Kristiansand municipality (intersects municipality)

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer,
       ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(ST_Union(omrade), 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS xmin,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS xmax,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand'
GROUP BY kommunenummer;

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer,
       ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(ST_Union(omrade), 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS xmin,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS xmax,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand'
GROUP BY kommunenummer;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM statistiskrutenett1km.public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE geom && ST_Envelope(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833),25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM stormflohavniva.stormflohavniva_03618ac2d6ba4ba0ae13e7ead6caf572.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE omrade && ST_Envelope(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833),25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 4
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

       ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(ST_Union(omrade), 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS xmin,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS xmax,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Union(omrade))) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand'
GROUP BY kommunenummer;
